title: Dadget's Animal Villagers
description: A resource pack that changes villagers into cute animals.
body:
# Dadget's Animal Villagers

Inspired by the piglins, this replaced each villages villagers with a unique animal.

- Desert villagers are now Rabbitlins
- Plains villagers are now Sheeplins
- Savanna villagers are now Dillolins
- Snowy villagers are now Goatlins
- Swamp villagers are now Froglins
- Taiga villagers are now Foxlins
- Wandering traders are now Turtlelins

Includes custom profession outfits for each profession type, and zombie variants of each villager type.

## NOTE: Requires Optifine or Entity Model Framework & Entity Texture Framework!

[![Optifine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/472307c88af84c7e6a5b7679981874a68445f3dc_0.webp)](https://optifine.net/home)

[![Entity Texture Framework](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e52c251cefe99c4e48d7ba60ec5f30d079ac0c6.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/328492a8b975e65303039d04d34a3353b3fd45fe.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
